title: Israel suspends battalion that detained CNN crew in West Bank
summary_full: Reservists from the IDF’s ultra-Orthodox Netzah Yehuda unit held CNN journalists for two hours on Thursday.
summary_public: Reservists from the IDF’s ultra-Orthodox Netzah Yehuda unit held CNN journalists for two hours on Thursday.

IL.label: neutral
IL.evidence: Israel suspends battalion that detained CNN crew in West Bank
